package rulefixtures

// scenario for slice_append_without_prealloc_known_bound: Slice append inside a range loop without visible preallocation when the bound is locally known.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: hot_path; severity: info.
type Rule363PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario363Positive(records []Rule363PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
